# Daily Report — 2026-07-23

## Task Completed
Add `delete_request_item` tool (DELETE sc_req_item/{sys_id}): permanently deletes a requested item (RITM) from ServiceNow. Accepts a RITM number (e.g. RITM0010001) or 32-character sys_id. Resolves RITM numbers to sys_id via `_resolve_request_item_sys_id`. Returns success on 204/200, failure on 404 or network error. Registered in the `service_desk` and `full` tool packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 2385
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Clean — pip-audit found no vulnerabilities.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/request_tools.py` — added `DeleteRequestItemParams` and `delete_request_item`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — added import and `__all__` entry
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — added import, params import, and tool registry entry
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added `delete_request_item` to `service_desk` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_request_tools.py` — added 11 new tests covering 204/200 success, number resolution, 404 guard, missing item_id, network errors, URL construction, and HTTP method

## Next Up
